title: Peaks And Valleys
description: Reorder an array into an alternating sequence of peaks and valleys, where a peak is greater than or equal to its neighbors and a valley is less than or equal to its neighbors.

content.text: Reorder an array into an alternating sequence of peaks and valleys, where a peak is greater than or equal to its neighbors and a valley is less than or equal to its neighbors.

Reorder an array into an alternating sequence of peaks and valleys, where a peak is greater than or equal to its neighbors and a valley is less than or equal to its neighbors. **Example:** ``` Input: [5, 3, 1, 2, 3] One valid output: [2, 1, 3, 3, 5] ```
